settings.bb_image_help: Adds a new button to the composer for image alignment. Large centered images are automatically resized to 60% of the post width, and side-aligned ones — up to 40%
settings.bb_iframe_help: Allows embedding iframes from any source. Use with caution — embedded content may include external scripts. 🧹 After changing this setting, please clear the Flarum cache
settings.bb_hide_login_help: Content is hidden from guests and visible to all logged-in users
settings.bb_hide_reply_help: Content is hidden until the user replies in the discussion
settings.bb_hide_like_help: Content is hidden until the user likes the post
settings.toolbar_group_help: If enabled, all MagicBB buttons will be grouped into a single one in the composer

hide.like_to_see: This content is visible after {like} the post
hide.reply_to_see: This content is visible after {reply} in the discussion
hide.login_to_see_simple: Log in to see this content
hide.like_to_see_simple: Like this post to see this content
hide.reply_to_see_simple: Reply in this discussion to see this content
